mapper.select: select count(1) from app_indent t1 where to_days(t1.creat_time) = to_days(now()) and t1.state = #{status}
SELECT user_b_id FROM app_indent WHERE state = 1 AND push = 0
SELECT username name,user_id value FROM app_employee WHERE user_id <> ''
SELECT b.url FROM app_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_img as b ON a.id = b.key_id WHERE a.id = #{indentId} AND b.type = 2
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE state = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE state = 3
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE state = 4
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE state = 5
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE state = 6
SELECT SUM(fixloss) FROM app_indent WHERE state = 1
SELECT SUM(fixloss) FROM app_indent WHERE state = 3
SELECT SUM(fixloss_user) FROM app_indent WHERE state = 5
SELECT id,is_rec,collate_time FROM app_indent WHERE DATE_ADD(creat_time,INTERVAL 7 DAY) < NOW() AND is_rec = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{id1} AND DATE_FORMAT( creat_time, '%Y%m' ) = DATE_FORMAT( CURDATE( ) , '%Y%m' )
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(fixloss),0) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{id1} AND DATE_FORMAT( creat_time, '%Y%m' ) = DATE_FORMAT( CURDATE( ) , '%Y%m' )
SELECT `name` FROM app_up_merchants WHERE id = #{upId}
SELECT merchants_name FROM app_b_user WHERE id = #{userBId}
SELECT * FROM app_indent WHERE remake like concat('%',#{remake},'%') ORDER BY app_indent.remake DESC LIMIT #{pageoffset},20
